faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Elmhurst, Queens?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Elmhurst typically ranges from $800 to $4,000, depending on the size of your property, extent of infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees, ensuring you understand all costs upfront before any work begins.

faqs.question: What types of termites are common in Elmhurst?
faqs.answer: Elmhurst properties primarily face subterranean termites, which live in soil and build mud tubes to access wood structures. These termites thrive in Queens' climate and can cause significant damage to foundations, floor joists, and wooden framing if left untreated. Our inspections identify the specific termite species and infestation severity.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Elmhurst homes?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Elmhurst are completed in one day, though extensive infestations may require additional visits. Liquid barrier treatments typically take 4-6 hours, while bait station installations are faster. We'll provide a detailed timeline during your free inspection based on your property's specific needs and the treatment method recommended.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite treatment guarantees in Elmhurst?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our termite treatments in Elmhurst come with comprehensive warranties ranging from one to several years depending on the service package selected. We include free annual inspections and will re-treat your property at no additional charge if termites return during the warranty period, giving you complete peace of mind.
